privileged_info_summary: The task operates on Odoo 17 Community Edition (docker image odoo:17, postgres:15) with hr_recruitment module installed. The applicant 'Alex Morgan' is synthetic data created dynamically in setup_task.sh with email alex.morgan@example.com and initial stage 'New'. The job position 'Consultant' is part of Odoo's official demo data (7 existing job positions: CEO, CTO, Consultant, Experienced Developer, HR Manager, Marketing Manager, Trainee). The recruitment stage 'First Interview' is created if missing with sequence 10. The tag 'High Potential' is a new category applied during task execution. The required note content is 'passed phone screening' which must appear in the chatter messages. Task uses sparse reward, 300-second timeout, 40-step maximum. Success criteria: 40 pts for correct stage, 30 pts for correct tag, 30 pts for note logged (70+ pts to pass).
